name: nmot_w
comment: engine speed (0.25 rpm/ct)

name: nmot_rpmclass
comment: rpm-class index = nmot/0xA0 (clamp 0xFF). NOT coolant (corrected)

name: rl_w
comment: measured relative load rl (feeds KFMIOP load axis); produced by sub_D34DC

name: rl_byte
comment: load byte = rl>>5 (loc_F47A>>5). NOT coolant (corrected)

name: rl_scaled
comment: scaled rl form (load family, sub_D34DC). NOT coolant

name: rl_w_gshj
comment: rl + offset (matches GSHJ rl_w cell)

name: throttle_pos_fb
comment: CORRECTED (was ml_hfm - wrong): linearized throttle-position feedback = (adc_ch1 - learned-stop offset word_302CB4) x gain word_302CA2 (sub_C96FC sole writer); servo PD feedback at 0xC6784; feeds KFMLDMX 'Throttle#' axis 0x161EE in HFM plausibility (sub_76A68) [C role; throttle identity per dict axis label + stop-learn]

name: rlsol_w
comment: relative-load setpoint (load request fed to LDR boost)

name: charge_modeled
comment: modeled charge from manifold pressure (sub_AD3D0)

name: charge_filtered
comment: PT1-filtered modeled charge

name: load_measured
comment: measured load / boost-actual (shared: LDR + charge model)

name: mi_target_arb
comment: arbitrated target torque (torque-coordinator input)

name: miopt_w
comment: optimum indicated torque (KFMIOP output)

name: mi_setpoint_cond
comment: conditioned torque/load setpoint (coordinator -> KFMIRL region)

name: ldr_setpoint
comment: boost-control setpoint (load domain)

name: ldr_actual_ratio
comment: boost actual ratio

name: ldr_demand
comment: final LDR wastegate demand

name: ldtvm_scaled
comment: scaled wastegate duty (pre-clamp)

name: lditv_w
comment: KFLDIMX-limited boost I-state (32-bit)

name: KFLDIMX_threshold
comment: LDR enable/authority threshold

name: WG_duty_min
comment: wastegate duty minimum clamp

name: WG_duty_max
comment: wastegate duty maximum clamp

name: overboost_rpm_trip
comment: over-boost RPM cut threshold (~6000)

name: wkr_global
comment: global knock retard (subtracted from advance)

name: dwkrz
comment: per-cylinder knock retard accumulator (5 entries)

name: zwbas
comment: base ignition advance (0.75 deg/ct)

name: zwout
comment: emitted per-cylinder spark advance

name: nwist_intake
comment: measured intake cam angle (VVT feedback)

name: nwist_exhaust
comment: measured exhaust cam angle (VVT feedback)

name: vvt_duty_intake
comment: intake cam-solenoid PWM duty

name: vvt_duty_exhaust
comment: exhaust cam-solenoid PWM duty

name: wnwise
comment: intake cam phase (KFZW blend fraction)

name: wnwisa
comment: exhaust cam phase (KFZW blend fraction)

name: lamfa_w
comment: driver-requested lambda (LAMFA result)

name: fuel_mult
comment: commanded fuel multiplier

name: fr_w
comment: lambda control / fuel-trim I-state (volatile)

name: ti_w
comment: injector pulse-width accumulator (32-bit)

name: rk_w
comment: relative fuel mass rk (-> RKTI sub_775C8)

name: lambda_trim_nv
comment: persistent learned lambda trim, page 0xC2 (LRA; restored at boot)

name: lambda_trim_applied
comment: applied learned lambda trim (LRA output)

name: start_enrich_factor
comment: start/after-start enrichment factor (folded into rk)

name: afterstart_timer
comment: after-start timer (enrichment decay axis; sub_D22B6)

name: cranking_inj_qty
comment: cranking injection quantity (battery-backed)

name: evap_purge_duty
comment: EVAP purge-valve PWM duty (page 0xC2)

name: evap_fuel_portion
comment: purge fuel-portion correction (FSRFKAS)

name: catheat_mode
comment: catalyst-heating/warm-up mode flag (sub_52D16; read by spark reserve)

name: idle_spark_reserve
comment: idle/startup spark reserve byte (sub_53DEC)

name: idle_torque_reserve
comment: published idle torque/load reserve (sub_7E36C)

name: rpmclass_oppoint
comment: idle/op-point rpm-class index

name: egt_modeled
comment: modeled EGT byte (sub_945C2 -> sub_8C636)

name: egt_overtemp_flag
comment: EGT over-temp flag (sub_8C636)

name: brake_booster_diag
comment: brake-booster vacuum diag result (sub_724E2)

name: flags_torque_revlimit
comment: torque/load + rev-limit state flags (.2 = over-rev fuel cut)

name: flags_start_phase
comment: start phase flags (.14 cranking, .15 after-start/running)

name: flags_idle_state
comment: idle-state flags (.9 = LLR active; read by spark reserve)

name: flags_diag_enable_a
comment: diag/codeword enable flags word A (bits set from CD*/CW* cal codewords by diag_codeword_expand_init, e.g. .6=KAMFZ .3=CDLSH .5=CDMD) [C]

name: flags_diag_enable_b
comment: diag/codeword enable flags word B (.14=CDLDP .15=CDLLR .0=EPRSLNR .4=CDAGR .2=CDDST .10=CDKVS .3=CDHSV .6=CDLSV .7=CDTEFST) [C]

name: flags_diag_enable_c
comment: codeword enable byte (.0=CDHSH .1=CDSLS .2=byte_1801E .3=byte_18024 .4=CDLASH) [C]

name: flags_diag_enable_d
comment: codeword enable byte (.0=CDKAT .1=CWSLS .2=SWTTNR .3=CWUVLOG) [C]

name: cfg_byte_18027_mirror
comment: RAM mirror of cal byte_18027 (diag_codeword_expand_init 0x9F18) [C]

name: flags_diag_cfg_a
comment: bit-addressable diag-config word (bits from cal 0x12600/0x12603/0x1802D/28/29/26; .14/.10/.12 forced set, .11 cleared at 0x9F1C-22) [C]

name: flags_diag_cfg_b
comment: bit-addressable diag-config word (bits from cal 0x1802A/2C/2D/28, 0x12605) [C]

name: adc_ch1_raw
comment: latched 10-bit ADC ch1 <<2 (loc_F2DA, sub_3FF58); throttle-pot track-1 channel: feeds sub_C96FC linearizer + etc_stop_learn_adapt (NOT the HFM channel - that is loc_F2DE) [C role]

name: adc_ch2_raw
comment: latched 10-bit ADC ch2 <<2 (loc_F2D6, sub_3FF58); parallel track averaged/cross-checked in stop-learn [C role]

name: adc_ch3_raw
comment: latched 10-bit ADC ch3 unshifted (loc_F2D8, sub_3FF58); sampled at 2 points in stop-learn gain/slope test [C role]

name: servo_pot_low_learned
comment: learned low-stop pot reference (etc_stop_learn_adapt; default word_16F1A on fail) [C]

name: servo_pot_high_learned
comment: learned high-stop pot reference (default word_16F30 on fail) [C]

name: servo_pot_lin_offset
comment: linearizer offset = learned low + margin word_302CC6, clamp 0xFFF (0xC88DE); subtracted from adc_ch1 by sub_C96FC at 0xC9708 [C]

name: servo_pot_high_bound
comment: high-side signal bound = learned high - margin word_302CC6 [C]

name: servo_pot_lin_gain
comment: pot linearizer gain (= 0x08000000/word_16F1C per load-rl.md; default word_16EFA on failed adapt, 0xC8948) [C]

name: servo_adapt_state
comment: stop-learn state machine state 0-0xB (sub_C7EEA) [C]

name: servo_adapt_errcode
comment: stop-learn abort code 0x14/0x18-0x1E; paired fault flag word_FD6C.7 [C]

name: servo_pwm_duty
comment: H-bridge PWM duty magnitude -> word_FE34 (PWM ch), period word_F034=9999; direction bit word_FD68.3 + port bits word_FFD0 (sub_C677A 0xC683A/0xC685A) [C]

name: servo_pos_setpoint
comment: servo position setpoint (error = loc_F446 - loc_F45E at 0xC6784) [C]

name: servo_pos_error
comment: servo position error, clamped +/-0xFFF (0xC67A0) [C]

name: hfm_raw
comment: raw HFM signal, 10-bit ADC latch loc_F2DC&0x3FF (sub_3FF30); index >>3 into MAF curve 0x160E8 (sub_7633C) [C]

name: ml_hfm_inst
comment: instantaneous HFM air mass: MAF curve 0x160E8 (128-pt word, /8 interp, overflow substitute word_161E8) on hfm_raw (sub_7633C 0x76354-76378) [C]

name: ml_hfm_accum
comment: HFM sample accumulator: 32-bit sum 0xF37A/0xF37C + count 0xF37E (sub_7633C adds each sample; sub_7628C drains+zeroes atomically) [C]

name: ml_hfm
comment: HFM air-mass signal = mean over task period (sub_7628C divl sum/count, 0x762D2; copy loc_F386); tested vs MLDHFMKU 0x2188A and KFMLDMX/KFMLDMN window in sub_76A68 (this is the real ml_hfm - moved off 0xF45E) [C]

name: ml_hfm_corr
comment: KFKHFM-corrected HFM air mass = ml_hfm x kfkhfm_factor word_3028A8, signed saturated (sub_7628C 0x762D6-76314) [C]

name: ml_hfm_corr_pos
comment: ml_hfm_corr clamped >=0 (0x76322; read by sub_D89CC/sub_6000C) [C]

name: ml_hfm_corr_floor
comment: ml_hfm_corr floored at MLMIN 0x160E6 kg/h (0x76326-76336; read by sub_ACF4A charge limiter) [C]

name: kfkhfm_factor
comment: KFKHFM correction factor, byte<<8 (sub_7638E: KFKHFM 0x138A5 keyed rpm-class byte_F40E x load byte byte_F473) [C]

name: hfm_diag_throttle_axis
comment: KFMLDMX Throttle#-axis input = throttle_pos_fb loc_F45E, or 0xFFF substitute when byte_13985.1 & word_FD7E.10 (sub_76A68 0x76A74-76A82) [C]

name: ml_plaus_max
comment: KFMLDMX 0x16208 output (Throttle# x RPM axes) = upper plausible HFM air mass; xFMLDMXKO 0x161EA then clamped MLDHFMKO 0x16298 -> loc_E4E8 (sub_76A68 0x76AB2) [C]

name: ml_plaus_min
comment: KFMLDMN 0x217F6 output (rpm-class x throttle pos) = lower plausible HFM air mass (sub_76462 0x76706) [C]

name: load_corr_wdk_blend
comment: blend of two dict-'HFM' surfaces 0x2778E/0x278E2 keyed (nmot x throttle_pos_fb), factor byte_30401D (sub_D337C 0xD347C); consumed by load assembly sub_D327E at 0xD333A [C role; physical meaning I]

name: vfzg_vehicle_speed
comment: vehicle speed: VMAX governor predicted-speed base (sub_50000), cruise actual (sub_CA5C6 0xCA6D0), class source for byte_3015D8 (=/0xA0); produced by sub_8A834, zeroed under fault gates [C role; vfzg token I]

name: vfzg_class
comment: vehicle-speed class byte = word_3029C6/0xA0 (fueling.md gating); compared vs LIVFZDE 0x18632 (km/h) + byte_1863C in sub_5369C (0x536D0/0x53964) [C]

name: mres_request
comment: OUTPUT of torque_reserve_request sub_5369C: final requested torque reserve, min-clamped by byte tbl 0x185FE(word_3019F0) (0x53C38) [C role; mres token I]

name: mres_idle
comment: idle torque-reserve component = MRESLL 0x18637<<6, ramp-down step byte_1854D (0x5375E/0x53786) [C]

name: mres_catheat_base
comment: reserve base sum = state-selected KFMRES-bank 2-D byte map (0x18551/69/81/C9) + map 0x185E1, clamped 0x400 then <<6 (0x53A96) [C mechanism; cat-heat identity I]

name: mres_ll_timer
comment: TVRESLL 0x1EFD0 countdown gating idle-reserve flag byte_30135C.0 (0x53714-0x53722) [C]

name: cruise_set_speed
comment: slew-limited target/set speed: +/-word_26B4E per cycle toward vfzg word_3029C6 or held, clamp [word_300C3A,word_300C38] (sub_CA5C6 0xCAD10/0xCAD54/0xCAD74); the 'follower' supervised by diag_setpoint_follow_monitor [C mechanism; cruise identity I]

name: cruise_state
comment: governor state-machine index 0..6, jump table 0xD33E (sub_CA5C6 0xCA73A-0xCA74A) [C]

name: cruise_torque_req
comment: OUTPUT of cruise_speed_governor: demand scaled by byte_304D4A, zeroed below authority threshold word_26B7A (0xCB350-0xCB364); read at 0xCB648 (sub_CB61C region) [C mechanism; semantic I]

name: cruise_i_state_lo
comment: governor integrator state lo (sub_430DA 0xCB0A8 -> 0xCB0B0) [C]

name: cruise_i_state_hi
comment: governor integrator state hi (0xCB0B4); seeded map-0x26BE0/2 on engage (0xCB00E) [C]

name: cruise_speed_corr
comment: correction/offset term: word map 0x26A7A or 0x26B02 (sub_41A68 input vfzg) or byte_1B96D or word_300C20/22/24, selected by deviation bands word_26B54/56/58 (0xCAB4C-0xCABD6) [C]

name: wdk_expected_from_charge
comment: expected throttle angle from charge = min(2-D byte map 0x1465E(rpm-class x byte_30178C via sub_40CA4), cap tbl 0x14724(rpm-class)) (0xC9B48-0xC9B58) [C]

name: wdk_charge_axis
comment: charge-derived axis input = ((byte_F473<<8)/(r13>>8))>>3 (0xC9B02-0xC9B1E) [C]

name: wdk_expected_filt_a
comment: PT1-filtered expected-throttle bank A (sub_42CF4, rate tbl 0x1470B by rpm-class, state word_300BFE) (0xC9BB6-0xC9BC0) [C]

name: wdk_expected_filt_b
comment: PT1-filtered expected-throttle bank B (state word_300C00) (0xC9C20-0xC9C2A) [C]

name: evap_purge_quantity
comment: EVAP purge quantity produced by evap_purge_ctrl (writer 0x8DE8E mov word_3052A8,r9); consumed by diag_evap_purge_monitor (0x9DBCA, divlu-normalized) [C]

name: egt_diag_status_flags_a
comment: EGT/exhaust diagnostic status flag bank A, set by diag_egt_status_monitor (sub_922B8) [C]

name: egt_diag_status_flags_b
comment: EGT/exhaust diagnostic status flag bank B, set by diag_egt_status_monitor (sub_922B8, e.g. 0x92A2C orb byte_301625) [C]

name: evap_monitor_flags
comment: EVAP purge-monitor status/condition flag bank base (byte_30169C-3016A8), maintained by diag_evap_purge_monitor (sub_9D894) [C]

name: o2_diag_status_word
comment: O2/lambda diagnostic status word packed to CAN by diag_o2_sensor_status_pack (sub_6C6DA via sub_B31AC); peers word_303B64/303B74 [C]

name: obd_cddst_monitor_flags
comment: CDDST OBD-monitor status flag byte, set by diag_obd_monitor_cddst (sub_AAC4E, 0xAAC66 orb byte_30171C) [C]

name: diag_status_frame_word0
comment: first word of the diagnostic status/ID frame block (word_300404-word_3004D8) built by diag_status_frame_init (sub_E018C); gate value cmp #3FD0h at sub_642C2 [C]

name: gear_index
comment: per-gear table index 1-7 (clamped cmpd1 #7) selecting DNFILO word 0x165DE+2*n in driveline_antijerk_damper 0x96B34-0x96B3A; also equality-gate byte_3014DD!=0 at 0x96AFA [C index role; gear identity I]

name: obd_denominator_ctr
comment: NV word (page 0xC2): incremented once per cycle by diag_obd_denominator_update 0xAF3C2 when run-time+at-speed+idle bits all set [C mechanism; IUMPR denominator identity I]

name: obd_ign_cycle_ctr
comment: NV word (page 0xC2): incremented by diag_obd_denominator_update 0xAF210 on engine-start condition edge (bits 30172E.6/2 clear + 30172F.0) [C mechanism; ignition-cycle counter identity I]

name: etc_adapt_seq_state
comment: state byte of etc_adapt_sequencer sub_C77DE (0xC7A4C/0xC7B2C writes); distinct from stop-learn state byte_301779 [C]

name: etc_adapt_seq_counter
comment: settle/retry counter of etc_adapt_sequencer (vs byte_14647/byte_14648, 0xC799A/0xC7A02) [C]

name: coding_index
comment: index 0-15 (0x10=invalid default) of the coding-indexed comms module: low nibble of mailbox word word_300E70 (0xDD286), block 0xE422 complement-checked (sub_DD1BA); selects per-variant byte from every 0x14C7D-0x14ED3+ table; TX status block word_302EA0-302EC4 with XOR checksum (sub_DF3D6) [C mechanism; variant-coding identity I]
